text:
There once was a sleepy little village where life crawled at a snail's pace. The villagers woke up only to go to bed again, dreaming of adventures beyond their sleepy haven. Every now and then, someone would have a brave dream, but waking up they would only dream more. Such was the village.

Every autumn the villagers would embark on a quest for the legendary Golden Harvest Sunflower. This mythical flower was rumored to bloom atop Mount Blanc, shining a golden light that filled gardens and lifted hearts. Each year, a few brave hearts would venture into the Alps to find it.

One particular year, a young girl named Clarice embarked on this adventure fervently. She took her pet squirrel, Fluffy, along. They traveled through meadows full of flowers and past forests filled with singing birds. Finally, they reached the snowy mountain, shivering but hopeful.

On the second day, Fluffy fell into a deep sleep, and Clarice sat beside him, gently shaking him. Still deep
